# RPB Full Technical Context

This file provides a comprehensive technical overview for AI agents interacting with the RPB project.

## Architecture Summary
- **Frontend/Backend**: Next.js 16.1.1 (App Router, Turbopack)
- **Database**: PostgreSQL via Prisma 7.2
- **Auth**: Better Auth with Discord OAuth
- **Bot**: Sapphire Framework (Discord.js 14)
- **UI**: MUI 7 with MD3 principles

## Core API Endpoints

- `GET /api/auth/*`: Better Auth endpoints.
- `GET/POST /api/tournaments`: Tournament lifecycle management.

## Database Schema (Key Models)
- `User`: { id, email, name, role, discordId }
- `Profile`: { userId, bladerName, experience, favoriteType }
- `Tournament`: { id, name, status, challongeId, date }
- `Beyblade`: { id, code, name, bladeId, ratchetId, bitId }

## Development Commands
- `pnpm dev`: Start dashboard
- `pnpm bot:dev`: Start discord bot (tsx)
- `pnpm db:push`: Update database schema
- `pnpm scrape:products`: Sync parts from Takara Tomy

## Contact & Governance
- Project for: RPB (République Populaire du Beyblade)
- Deployment: Hetzner / Coolify / rpbey.fr
- Agent Identity: Gemini Agent (gemini@rpbey.fr)
